Class KafkaStreamsConsumerProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka.properties.KafkaConsumerProperties
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka.streams.properties.KafkaStreamsConsumerProperties
public class KafkaStreamsConsumerProperties extends KafkaConsumerProperties
Extended properties for Kafka Streams consumer.
Author:
Marius Bogoevici, Soby Chacko, Gihong Park
